objectives.text: 掌握 if 引导的条件状语从句

blocks.content: if 引导的条件状语从句表示**假设或条件**，是初中阶段最重要的从句之一：

rows: If it rains tomorrow, I will stay home.
If you study hard, you can pass the exam.
If I were rich, I would travel the world.

blocks.content: **主将从现**是条件状语从句最重要的时态规则：

blocks.title: 主将从现
blocks.content: 主句用一般将来时（will + 动词原形），从句用一般现在时代替将来时。这是英语中「时间/条件从句不用将来时」的规则。

blocks.title: 易错点
blocks.content: 从句中即使表示将来，也不能用 will。正确：If it rains... 错误：If it will rain...

rows: If you come, I will wait for you.
If you will come, I will wait for you.
When she will arrive, call me.

blocks.content: unless = if...not，意思是「除非，如果不」：

blocks.title: 转换公式
blocks.content: You will fail unless you study hard. = You will fail if you don't study hard. 两个句子意思相同。

rows: Unless you hurry, you will be late.
If you don't hurry, you will be late.
I won't go unless you go with me.
I won't go if you don't go with me.

problem.content: If it ___ sunny tomorrow, we will go to the beach.

solution.content: 这是 if 引导的条件状语从句，遵循「主将从现」原则。主句 will go 是将来时，从句应该用一般现在时 is。答案选 B。

problem.content: You can't succeed ___ you work hard. 选择正确选项。

solution.content: 句意是「除非你努力，否则你不能成功」。unless = if...not，用在这里正好表达「如果不努力就不能成功」。答案选 B。

children.text: If + 一般现在时，主句用一般将来时
从句不用 will，用一般现在时
适用于 if/when/before/after 等从句
